title: Nine Sols Parry
description: Adds the parry system from Nine Sols (precise/imprecise parries, unbounded counter, internal damage)
body:
**Have you ever wanted to become John "Yi" Nine Sols in Minecraft? If so, this mod is for you!**

It adds the parry system from the game. You need to time your parries or else you will perform an imprecise parry, which will deal internal damage. Internal damage builds up the more you do imprecise parries. If you have internal damage and you get hit, the built up damage will be dealt as well as the current damage. Internal damage slowly heals over time or can be healed by using the medicine pipe.

![Parry](https://i.postimg.cc/52MXrd7P/parry.gif)

By holding the parry button, you will perform an unbounded counter. The unbounded counter needs to be released right before an attack in order to parry it and you will be stuck in place while performing the parry. On successful parry, foes will be pushed back and be dealt internal damage. Projectiles will be thrown back at the shooter when parrying with the counter.

![Unbounded Counter](https://i.postimg.cc/VvCN7Djs/unbounded-counter.gif)

Perfect Parries produce Qi, which can be used for talismans. Talismans can deal internal damage to enemies when attached. If you hold down the use button, you can make the talisman explode, dealing a lot of damage and converting all internal damage into actual damage.

On top of the regular talisman, there are 3 different types of talismans that you can craft:

Transmute Unto Life: killing an entity with the talisman heals you

Transmute Unto Wealth: killing an entity with the talisman drops gold, iron, emeralds and more XP

Transmute Unto Qi: killing an entity with the talisman produces 1 Qi charge

**Needs playerAnimator to work!**

**Made with MCreator**
